title: CID
subTitle: A woman goes missing from her in-law's boutique. The store manager claims that she left in a white Police jeep. CID is quick to trace the car to a remote location and upon.

title: Pati Patni Aur Woh
subTitle: Chintu Tyagi is an ordinary, middle class man who finds himself torn between his wife and another woman.

title: Sir
subTitle: Amid efforts from bigots to limit schooling, a young teacher joins his father in their family legacy to continue ensuring equal education for all.

title: Comedy Station
subTitle: Various talented comedians perform hilarious skits and stand-up acts on diverse themes and topics to entertain the audience.

subTitle: A team of researchers is in Borneo to find the blood orchid, a flower that could hold the secret to eternal life. However, the scientists run afoul of the jungle's deadly snakes.

subTitle: A gold appraiser discovers his grandfather's long-kept secret. Later, he decides to help him set things right, but he encounters several obstacles along the way.

subTitle: The alcoholic husband remains clueless about his wife's disappearance. Hardly getting out of his intoxicated universe, he lives in complete denial.

subTitle: Team CID deal with two lookalike criminals Arjun and Girish, who keep them guessing on whether they are twins or the same person trying to fool them. No one seems to have any information about them.

subTitle: A man is shocked to see his friend's dead body replaced by another man's body. Soon, he calls upon the CID team for help, but he himself becomes the culprit.

subTitle: When a woman takes a taxi to go drop off a package at a building but never comes back out, the driver, concerned, calls CID to the scene.

subTitle: ACP Pradyuman, Daya and Abhijeet are an elite trio of officers who work for the CID. Together, they seek the help of professional forensic expert Dr Salunkhe to solve various criminal cases.

subTitle: As Dilip, his family and business partner Rohan mark their legal win at a restaurant, Anita enters and screams that Dilip will burn. After she is dragged out, Dilip's chair catches fire, killing him.
